race.comment: KING MAYWIN (6) ran a good race first up at Geelong when kept safe in betting, sticking on gamely for a narrow third over 1200m. He'll come on from that and should go close despite a tricky draw. TESTY NIC (8) was just behind KING MAYWIN at Geelong, also first up and off a longer spell. He got home strongly there and looks hard to hold out up in trip. ASK YOUR MOTHER (1) has placed in all three runs this time in, coming back slightly in trip from last start at Bendigo. He's off a let up and should take beating. SHEEZADEE (12) is a filly by Written Tycoon on debut for the Freedman yard who must be respected while PRAGUE PRIDE (11) has each way claims.
